title: WOS Ontology Alignment Sidecar
description: A WOS Ontology Alignment sidecar document. Renamed from the prior wos-semantic-profile per ADR 0076 D-3. Declares linked-data semantics for a WOS workflow without altering core processing: a JSON-LD @context mapping WOS properties to RDF terms, SHACL shape references for semantic validation, PROV-O vocabulary mappings for provenance export, and XES/OCEL configuration for process mining interoperability. Per ADR 0076 D-3, transition-tag vocabulary returns to the kernel/spec.md and is intentionally NOT part of this sidecar; only ontology export concerns remain. Adds interpretation and export capability — never changes how WOS documents are processed at runtime.

^x-.$comment: Vendor extensions per Kernel spec §10.6 (extensions escape hatch)

$wosOntologyAlignment.description: WOS Ontology Alignment specification version. MUST be '1.0'. Identifies this document as a WOS Ontology Alignment sidecar (formerly wos-semantic-profile) and pins the specification version. Processors reject documents with unsupported versions.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for WOS Ontology Alignment sidecar (per ADR 0076 D-3)

targetWorkflow.description: The WOS Kernel Document this ontology alignment targets. Specifies URL and compatible version range. The ontology processor resolves the JSON-LD context, SHACL shapes, PROV-O namespace, and process mining configuration when the kernel document URI matches.

x-lm.intent: Binds this ontology-alignment sidecar to a specific kernel workflow and version range

version.description: Version of this Ontology Alignment Document. SemVer is RECOMMENDED.

title.description: Human-readable name for this ontology alignment. Displayed in tooling and provenance exports when identifying the linked-data layer for this workflow.

description.description: Human-readable description of the ontology alignment's purpose and scope. Documents which vocabularies, shape graphs, and export formats are configured for this deployment.
examples: Adds NIEM human services linked data semantics, SHACL validation, and OCEL 2.0 process mining export to the benefits adjudication workflow.

context.description: JSON-LD @context configuration. Declares the context document URL, version, additional namespaces, and domain vocabulary extensions.

x-lm.intent: JSON-LD context configuration that maps WOS properties to RDF terms

shapes.description: SHACL shape configuration. Declares shape graph URIs for semantic validation of WOS documents interpreted as RDF.

provMapping.description: PROV-O vocabulary mapping configuration. Declares how WOS provenance records map to W3C PROV-O graphs.

processMining.description: XES/OCEL export configuration. Declares how WOS provenance records map to process mining event formats.

url.description: Canonical URL of the target WOS Kernel Document. The ontology processor resolves the JSON-LD context, SHACL shapes, PROV-O namespace, and process mining configuration from this sidecar when the kernel document URI matches this value exactly.

x-lm.intent: Identifies the kernel workflow this alignment provides linked data semantics for

compatibleVersions.description: SemVer range expression for compatible kernel document versions.

contextUrl.description: URL of the JSON-LD @context document to apply to WOS documents. The normative WOS context is published at https://wos-spec.org/context/{version}. Custom deployments may publish their own context extending the base WOS context.

x-lm.intent: URL of the JSON-LD context document that maps WOS properties to RDF IRIs

contextVersion.description: Version of the context document. Synchronized with the WOS specification version. An ontology processor MUST reject a context document whose major version it does not support.

x-lm.intent: Context document version for compatibility checking

additionalProperties.description: Namespace IRI for this prefix. MUST be a valid absolute URI that serves as the base IRI for terms in the named vocabulary. Appended to prefix declarations in the JSON-LD @context.

namespaces.description: Additional namespace prefix-to-IRI mappings beyond the base WOS context. Keys are namespace prefixes, values are namespace IRIs.

domainVocabularies.description: External domain vocabularies to incorporate into the @context. Each vocabulary declares a namespace prefix and IRI for domain-specific case data interoperability.

prefix.description: Namespace prefix for this vocabulary. Used in the expanded @context.

namespace.description: Namespace IRI for this vocabulary. Used as the base IRI for terms from this vocabulary in the JSON-LD @context expansion. MUST be a resolvable or well-known absolute URI.

description.description: Human-readable description of this vocabulary's purpose and scope. Documents which domain concepts are covered and why this vocabulary was selected for semantic interoperability.
examples: NIEM 5.2 Human Services domain vocabulary for case and benefit terminology.

items.description: URI of a SHACL shape graph document. The ontology processor fetches and applies each shape graph during validation. The normative WOS shapes are at https://wos-spec.org/shapes/1.0.0.

shapeGraphs.description: URIs of SHACL shape graphs to apply when validating WOS documents as RDF. The standard WOS shapes (SP-01 through SP-08) are published at https://wos-spec.org/shapes/1.0.0.

x-lm.intent: SHACL shape graph URIs for semantic validation of WOS documents

severity.description: Minimum severity for reported SHACL violations. 'violation': only sh:Violation results. 'warning': sh:Violation and sh:Warning. 'info': all results including sh:Info.

scope.description: What to validate with SHACL shapes. 'definition': the workflow definition only. 'provenance': provenance records only. 'all': both definition and provenance.

provenanceNamespace.description: Base namespace for minting provenance IRIs in the PROV-O output graph. Record identifiers are appended to this namespace to form Activity IRIs. All prov:Activity and prov:Entity IRIs in the exported graph use this as their base.

x-lm.intent: Base IRI namespace for PROV-O provenance graph output

additionalProperties.description: RDF type IRI for this WOS actor type in the PROV-O output graph. Must be a valid absolute URI that is a subclass of prov:Agent or a recognized PROV-O agent type.

actorMapping.description: Customized mapping of WOS actor types to PROV-O Agent subclass IRIs. Keys are WOS actor types ('human', 'system', 'agent'), values are RDF type IRIs. Defaults: human -> prov:Person, system -> prov:SoftwareAgent, agent -> wos:AIAgent.

reasoning.description: RDF type IRI for Reasoning tier prov:Bundle instances in the PROV-O graph output. Overrides the default wos:ReasoningBundle type for agency-specific PROV-O vocabulary.

counterfactual.description: RDF type IRI for Counterfactual tier prov:Bundle instances in the PROV-O graph output. Overrides the default wos:CounterfactualBundle type for agency-specific PROV-O vocabulary.

narrative.description: RDF type IRI for Narrative tier prov:Bundle instances. Narrative bundles MUST include wos:authoritative false. Overrides the default wos:NarrativeBundle type for agency-specific vocabulary.

tierMapping.description: Customized mapping of WOS provenance tiers to PROV-O Bundle type IRIs.

items.description: Process mining export format identifier. 'xes': IEEE XES (Std 1849-2016) for compatibility with legacy process mining tools. 'ocel': OCEL 2.0 object-centric event log for modern multi-object process mining.

formats.description: Process mining export formats to support. 'xes': IEEE XES (Std 1849-2016) for legacy process mining tools. 'ocel': OCEL 2.0 object-centric event logs for modern process mining. Both may be specified.

x-lm.intent: Process mining export format selection (XES and/or OCEL 2.0)

caseIdentifier.description: The case state field used as the XES case identifier (trace concept:name). Default: 'instanceId'.

eventClassifier.description: The provenance field used as the XES activity classifier (event concept:name). Default: 'action'.

items.description: A WOS case file item type name to include as an OCEL object type in the object-centric event log. Corresponds to a top-level key under caseFile in the workflow's case state.

objectTypes.description: For OCEL export: WOS object types (case file item types) to include in the object-centric event log. When omitted, all case file item types are included.

ExtensionsMap.description: Vendor extension data attached to this node. All keys MUST start with 'x-' (see Kernel §10.6). The reserved namespace 'x-wos-*' is for WOS Working Group use only; third-party extensions MUST use a unique vendor prefix (e.g., 'x-acme-', 'x-vendor-'). Processors MUST ignore unknown extension keys to preserve forward compatibility. Extension values are unconstrained — any JSON value is valid, but authors are encouraged to document the shape in their vendor spec.

JsonSchemaUri.description: Optional JSON Schema URI enabling editor validation and autocompletion. When present, editors (VS Code, IntelliJ, etc.) validate the document against this schema. Omit in production documents; the authoritative schema URI is derived from the document type marker (e.g., '$wosOntologyAlignment': '1.0'). Used for author-time tooling only — runtime processors MUST ignore this field.
